name: Tavern floor scouring
description: Scrub the ale-stained floorboards of the local tavern, banishing the grime and echoes of last night's revelry. A humble task for those seeking coin and humility.

name: Dishwashing
description: Plunge your hands into greasy water and cleanse the tavern's mountain of soiled plates and tankards. The work is thankless, but the pay is certain.

name: Library attendant
description: Assist a reclusive scholar in his dust-choked library, sorting ancient tomes and deciphering cryptic manuscripts. Knowledge and coin await the diligent.

name: Chickens on the loose
description: Round up every chicken that fled the farmer's hoop before their frantic clucks draw darker things from the hedgerow.

name: Prospecting
description: Spend your hours with a pickaxe in the haunted mines, seeking ruby and gold hidden in stone steeped with restless shadows.

name: Arm wrestling
description: Win the arm wrestling contest in a local tavern, driving your rival's hand down under the weight of stale ale and hungry whispers.

name: Dice rolling
description: Test your luck in a dice game against the tavern's crowd, casting bones beneath flickering torchlight to outplay every shadowed rival.
